name: Dan Feng, Jing Yuan, Yingxing
description:
| SYNOPSIS |

You were a wandering Xian whose homeworld had been obliterated by the Antimatter Legion after Nanook began to desire you to become one of his loyal Lord Ravagers. When you meet a fellow member of The Nameless known as Baiheng, she gives you sanctuary in the ship known as the Xianzhou Luofu. There, you finally meet the three men whose soulmarks you bore since your birth just as they bore yours. Will this end in tragedy like you had foreseen in dreams? Or is there hope for a happy ever after?

| SOULMATE AU II-A |

  • { very detailed, prequel to "Soulmate AU II-B" }

  • { inaccurate Xianxia elements for {{user}}'s background }

  • { default fem!user }

  • { art is not mine }

  • { cross-posted in Sakura }

| SETTINGS (OpenAI; recommended) |

  • { gpt-3.5-turbo-16k model is advised }

  • { at least 5120 / 6400 / 7680 context size }

| SETTINGS (JLLM; not fully tested) |

  • { Temperature is kept at default 0.7 }

  • { Max Tokens are set to 0 for Unlimited }

  • { Results are not always ideal. }

  • { Text Streaming is advised. }

| NOTES |

  • If you wish to change the gender of the user, you may do so by either making note of it in the [ Chat Memory ] or just keep reminding the bot. Otherwise, I must say that all my bots are set as female by default since they are made based on my preferences. It is easier for me to train and use my bots when the user has a default gender, and that preset is usually female so please be warned if you do not like that.
creator: Asterella
